text.title: ads-retargeting Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ads-retargeting as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running retargeting for only cart abandoners and ignoring the rest of the funnel.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Full-funnel retargeting captures the majority of non-converting visitors at every intent level. Cart abandoners represent less than 5% of traffic; building retargeting only for them ignores 95% of the recoverable opportunity.
